title: Add studio names to Locations section

requirements.summary: Update the Location component to display named studio entries with studio names prominently above addresses
acceptanceCriteria: The first location entry displays 'Studio Belvedere' as a name/title above 'Prinz Eugen Straße 48/1-2, 1040 Vienna, Austria'.
The second location entry displays 'Clinicus Natura' as a name/title above 'Rua do Raio nº26, Braga, Portugal'.
The third entry displays 'Off location, travel and via Zoom may be available upon request' without a studio name prefix.
No other addresses or location references appear in the component.

file_operations.description: Update the location entries to display studio names above addresses. Add 'Studio Belvedere' as a prominent heading above the Vienna address, 'Clinicus Natura' above the Braga address, and keep the third entry (Zoom/travel option) without a studio name prefix. Ensure the section heading remains 'Locations' and maintain the existing two-column layout with the studio image.
